items.name: Rainbow Summer T-Shirt
items.description:
Rainbow RGB Tie Dye Summer Gamer T-Shirt

This epic and mega cool rainbow lasers powers t-shirt features a magic set of rainbow stripes aesthetic with red / orange / yellow / green / blue / indigo / violet / pink super colors on a dark black background. Take this ultra colourful and awsome ultimate classic elemental rainbow wherever you go with this colorful RGB tye dye gaming aesthetic shirt ! Be the coolest and best gamer !!!
